Use the content-alchemist skills you have access to:

2. Create ONE complete social media post (Instagram/X/TikTok/Facebook - choose the best platform for the content)
3. Include:
   - Platform-optimized copy
   - Suggested hashtags
   - Image prompt for Nano Banana (use nanobanana-pro skill) to generate a 4K glassmorphic visual
4. Post your final content to the #content Slack channel using the message tool

Brand: Dream Oracle (AI dream interpretation)
Tone: Ethereal, warm, curious, grounded — "not prophetic, they're personal"
Price: $7.99/mo Reflective Explorer tier
Key value: Unified Lens methodology (Freud + Jung + Cognitive)

Generate the image and prepare the full post with caption, hashtags, and image file path. Then post to Slack channel C0AEB9UMHFE (#content).
